heading_styles.h1: font-serif text-5xl md:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-none
heading_styles.label: font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-muted-foreground

landing_page.rules: Asymmetrical layout. Hero takes 8 cols, secondary 4. Use negative space.

dashboard.rules: Compact, data-dense. 100% height utilization. No jagged bottoms.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-none px-8 py-6 text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest transition-all hover:scale-[1.02]
buttons.secondary: border border-border bg-transparent hover:bg-white/5 text-white rounded-none px-8 py-6 text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest

cards.default: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-md rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors p-6

inputs.default: bg-zinc-900/50 border-zinc-800 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-md h-12

availability_board.container: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden
availability_board.row: border-b border-white/5 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors grid grid-cols-12 items-center py-4 px-6

status_badge.available: bg-green-500/10 text-green-500 border border-green-500/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide
status_badge.coming_soon: bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-500 border border-yellow-500/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide
status_badge.sold_out: bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide

visual_enhancers.noise_texture: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")
visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: absolute inset-0 border border-transparent [mask-image:linear-gradient(transparent,black)] before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-transparent before:via-primary before:to-transparent before:animate-border-flow

product_chili.alt: Fresh red chili peppers on dark surface

product_avocado.alt: Premium avocado on reflective black surface

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'clsx' and 'tailwind-merge' for dynamic class handling.
Use the 'Bento' grid system for the dashboard. Do not create a generic table.
The 'Availability Board' must look like a flight arrival board or stock ticker. High tech, high contrast.
Use the 'Tracing Beam' effect on the 'Reserve Shipment' active step indicator.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast against the dark background. Use 'text-zinc-400' for secondary text, not 'text-gray-500'.
For the 'Proof Wall', use a masonry layout with the provided product images.
Implement the 'WhatsApp' button as a floating fixed element at bottom-right, z-index 50.
Use 'Playfair Display' for all Headings to give that 'Premium/Magazine' feel.
universal_guidelines: Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
